introSection: Speed is steel water roller coaster at Energylandia in Zator, Małopolskie, Poland. Opened in 2018, it is the world's tallest (tied with Divertical at Mirabilandia) and fastest water roller coaster.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Speed is an Intamin Water Coaster, similar to Divertical at Mirabilandia.

fullText:
Speed is steel water roller coaster at Energylandia in Zator, Małopolskie, Poland. Opened in 2018, it is the world's tallest (tied with Divertical at Mirabilandia) and fastest water roller coaster.

Speed is an Intamin Water Coaster, similar to Divertical at Mirabilandia.
